title: Cinematic Action Hero
prompt: Gritty cinematic poster, black background with red grunge texture and film grain. Double exposure composition: Large close-up of a South Indian man's intense face and eye on left, monochrome with red rim lighting. Overlaid on right: full body of same bearded man in rolled-sleeve shirt and pants, holding a combat knife, looking back over shoulder. Dramatic red backlighting outlining hair and clothes. Large vertical red stylized text behind the figure with cracked texture.

title: Velvet Lounge Editorial
prompt: Ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial, young man with messy hair over the eye, lounging casually on a luxurious velvet sofa in modern studio. Wearing silk ivory shirt half-open with layered necklaces, paired with cream tailored pants. Soft golden light and blurred chandelier glow in background. Elegant, classy, trending editorial. 100% Real Face 8K Resolution.
